title: Built AI-powered analytics and reporting agents
description: Developed AI-powered analytics agents using OpenAI APIs to automate sales reporting, PPC bid analysis, keyword optimization, and operational performance monitoring across Amazon and Shopify channels.
business_problem: Manual reporting and PPC optimization workflows were time-intensive and difficult to scale across multiple marketplaces and inventory environments.
solution: Built Python-based AI workflows integrating sales, advertising, and inventory datasets into automated reporting and decision-support systems.
business_impact: Reduced manual reporting and analysis effort by approximately 80%
Improved speed and consistency of PPC optimization decisions

title: Drove bundle strategy using sales and profitability analytics
description: Used Python-based demand and profitability analysis to launch new bundled product configurations including 3-packs and 6-packs.
business_problem: Single-unit product mix limited revenue growth and average order value opportunities.
solution: Analyzed customer purchasing patterns, profitability metrics, and conversion behavior to identify opportunities for bundled offerings.
business_impact: 3-pack products grew to 75% of total revenue
Improved product mix and operational efficiency

title: Built multi-warehouse inventory forecasting platform
description: Developed forecasting and replenishment systems integrating Amazon FBA, AWD, local warehouse, and bundled SKU conversion logic.
business_problem: Bundle-based sales and multi-warehouse inventory created inaccurate purchasing and replenishment decisions.
solution: Built Python forecasting logic converting bundle sales into single-unit demand signals while aggregating inventory across warehouse environments.
business_impact: Improved inventory visibility across multiple fulfillment environments

title: Scaled e-commerce revenue through analytics-driven optimization
description: Led data-driven optimization across pricing, listings, PPC campaigns, and product strategy for Amazon and Shopify operations.
business_problem: Initial marketplace performance and advertising efficiency limited scalable growth.
solution: Implemented KPI-driven optimization strategies focused on TACOS, ROAS, keyword profitability, and conversion improvements.

title: Increased enterprise API adoption by 35%
description: Led initiatives focused on simplifying enterprise REST API integrations and improving customer onboarding experiences for IoT telemetry analytics platforms.
business_problem: Enterprise customers faced integration complexity and onboarding friction when integrating telemetry data into operational systems.
solution: Prioritized customer-driven API enhancements and workflow simplification initiatives.

title: Built IoT telemetry analytics solutions for enterprise customers
description: Developed customer-facing analytics dashboards leveraging IoT telemetry and trip sensor data for transportation and food logistics customers.
business_problem: Customers lacked operational visibility into route performance, temperature excursions, and carrier efficiency.
solution: Built analytics reporting solutions and KPI frameworks using telemetry and trip data.
business_impact: Improved operational visibility for enterprise customers

title: Owned roadmap for MyQ Community platform
description: Managed roadmap prioritization, feature delivery, and backlog planning for customer-facing and internal MyQ Community platform features.
business_problem: Platform growth required improved feature prioritization, sprint execution, and stakeholder visibility.
solution: Implemented Agile backlog prioritization using RICE methodology while coordinating frontend, backend, and QE teams.

title: Built KPI dashboards and onboarding analytics systems
description: Defined and monitored platform KPIs related to onboarding, engagement, and user activity for the MyQ Community platform.
business_problem: Leadership lacked visibility into user onboarding and platform engagement metrics.
solution: Built Power BI dashboards and automated reporting workflows integrating Databricks and product usage analytics.

title: Built internal inventory management platform
description: Developed and deployed a custom inventory management platform using Streamlit and Hugging Face Spaces to support warehouse operations, FBA workflows, consignments, and inventory tracking.
business_problem: Inventory operations relied on Google Sheets and Slack conversations, creating inconsistencies and fragmented operational visibility.
solution: Built centralized inventory tooling supporting inbound and outbound inventory tracking across local warehouses, FBA, AWD, distributors, and consignments.
business_impact: Centralized inventory operations into a single system
Improved inventory consistency and operational visibility

title: Built automated PO planning and replenishment system
description: Developed Python-based PO planning systems automating vendor purchasing, AWD replenishment, and FBA inventory allocation decisions.
business_problem: Multi-warehouse inventory and bundle-based sales complicated purchasing accuracy and replenishment planning.
solution: Built forecasting and replenishment models incorporating SKU-level reorder points, vendor lead times, MOQ optimization, freight cost modeling, and bundle conversion logic.

title: Built KPI dashboards supporting growth and product strategy
description: Developed operational dashboards and reporting systems used to support pricing strategy, PPC optimization, and bundle experimentation decisions.
business_problem: Growth decisions lacked centralized visibility into advertising efficiency, bundle performance, and profitability metrics.
solution: Built daily and weekly KPI reporting systems tracking ROAS, TACOS, product mix performance, and bundle contribution.

Supported strategic bundle and pricing decisions

title: Led customer-driven product design and optimization process
description: Conducted customer interviews and iterative product testing cycles to refine sock fit, materials, color selection, and minimalist product design.

Supported successful product adoption and review growth

description: Developed ETL workflows using Python and Azure-based systems to cleanse, normalize, and process enterprise IoT telemetry and customer trip data.
business_problem: Customer-provided data fields were inconsistent and required normalization before analytics processing.

title: Defined scalable MVP strategy for telemetry analytics platform
